description: Pass-the-hash mitigation requires the same salted-hash DB migration as FINDING_A_004. Since A_004 was marked needs_human_review (requires schema migration, client protocol changes, and backward compatibility handling), this finding inherits the same dependency.
reason: Fix requires: (1) salted hash storage (same as A_004 DB migration), (2) challenge-response protocol for login, (3) client-side changes. Depends on A_004 being resolved first.
